text: Day 45 PM roundup: US NAVAL BLOCKADE IN EFFECT 10am ET. Iran 'maximum combat alert.' Trump: ships 'eliminated.' IDF Chief war readiness. Netanyahu Holocaust Day supports blockade. Qassem: talks 'pointless.' Nahariya rocket — woman wounded. 34 killed Lebanon. Oil Brent $102.80, WTI $104.88. Dow -0.56%. Switzerland mediates. OFAC expires April 19. Ceasefire 9 days from expiry.
verificationNote: Compiled from CNBC, CNN, CBS, Times of Israel, JPost, Al Jazeera, NPR, Bloomberg, Newsweek.

text: Turkey formally accuses Netanyahu of war crimes, calls him 'Hitler of our time.' Prosecutors file indictments against 35 Israeli officials seeking 4,596 years. Erdogan: 'Just as we entered Libya and Karabakh, we can enter Israel.' Israel fires back — Netanyahu: Erdogan 'massacred his own Kurdish citizens.' Diplomatic rupture deepening.
verificationNote: Haaretz, JPost, Times of Israel confirmed Turkey accusations and Israeli responses.

text: CNN exclusive: US intelligence indicates China preparing MANPAD air defense systems for Iran, routed through third countries. Trump threatens 50% tariffs. Chinese embassy denies. This is the biggest potential escalation since the war began — if China arms Iran, entire geopolitical calculus changes. Watch Beijing closely.
verificationNote: CNN exclusive confirmed. CNBC, Bloomberg, Military.com, The Hill all reported. Chinese denial on record.

text: IAF struck ~150 Hezbollah targets in 24h per IDF — launchers, drones, anti-tank, HQs, cells. Hezbollah responded with 43 operations Sunday: drone on Golan comms hub (Al-Alika barracks), direct Merkava tank hit near Mays al-Jabal, strikes on Meron air surveillance and Filon base. Karmiel 5-rocket barrage: 4 intercepted. Both sides intensifying.
verificationNote: TASS, Tribune India, Press TV, ANI News, Times of Israel liveblog confirmed.

text: Soufan Center brief: US blockade is 'big task, big gamble' — open-ended military endeavor with no clear endgame. Military Times experts warn of resource strain. Meanwhile Araghchi says Iran was 'inches away' from Islamabad MoU before US 'maximalism' killed it. Zero diplomatic track remaining. Ceasefire expires ~April 22.
verificationNote: Soufan Center IntelBrief April 13. Military Times, Aaj English, MENAFN confirmed.

text: Day 45 LATE PM roundup: IAF 150 Hezbollah targets. Hezbollah 43 ops (Golan, Merkava, Meron). Eli Cohen wants Beirut airport/ports/power struck. Erdogan: Netanyahu 'Hitler.' China arms to Iran. Araghchi 'zero lessons.' Guterres 'wider war.' France/UK Hormuz conf. Pezeshkian defends Pope. Brent settles $101.82. WTI $98.00. Gas $4.125. SPR 53.7M bbl total. IMF 'no return to normal.'
verificationNote: Compiled from TASS, Press TV, MEE, Haaretz, CNN, CNBC, Aaj English, UN News, Bloomberg, Trading Economics, AAA.

text: CENTCOM blockade OFFICIALLY IN EFFECT as of 14:00 GMT. USS Abraham Lincoln + 11 destroyers enforcing. Chinese tanker Rich Starry (~250K bbl methanol) is FIRST VESSEL to test the blockade. Trump posted 23 min later: ships 'will be immediately ELIMINATED.' Ostria (Botswana-flagged) reversed course 41 min after deadline. This is the most dangerous naval standoff since the Cuban Missile Crisis.
verificationNote: CENTCOM press release, Bloomberg, NBC News confirmed blockade activation and tanker test.

text: IDF 98th Division COMPLETES encirclement of Bint Jbeil — 100+ Hezbollah killed in CQC. Paratroopers, Commando, Givati Brigades. Hundreds of weapons seized. Only 'several dozen' fighters remain. This is the deepest penetration into Hezbollah heartland since 2006. Sgt. Maj. Bianco (30, 188th Armored) KIA — 13th IDF soldier killed in Lebanon since Feb 28.
verificationNote: i24NEWS, Times of Israel, Israel Hayom, Jerusalem Post confirmed encirclement and casualty.

text: Oil PULLING BACK from April 13 highs. Brent $98.05 (from $101.82 close), WTI $96.57 (from $98.00). Trump signals Iran 'wants to work a deal' — easing prices. But physical crude in Europe near $150/bbl record. OPEC March production plunged 27% (steepest since 1980s). S&P 500 erased ALL war losses as of April 13 close. Markets cautiously optimistic.
verificationNote: CNBC, Trading Economics confirmed oil pullback. CNN confirmed OPEC data.

text: Rubio hosting FIRST direct Israel-Lebanon ambassador talks at State Dept — highest-level since 1993. Israeli Amb. Leiter + Lebanese Amb. Moawad. Hezbollah leader Qassem torpedoes from Beirut: 'We reject negotiations — futile and submission.' Warns of soldier abductions. Lebanon PM Salam CANCELLED own trip under Hezbollah pressure. This is diplomacy vs. Hezbollah veto power in real time.
verificationNote: Axios, Time, Military.com, Al Jazeera confirmed talks and Qassem rejection.

text: Iran central bank WARNED regime of imminent economic collapse: 180% inflation, 2M newly unemployed, 12-year recovery timeline even without sanctions. Central bank governor urged Pezeshkian to lift internet restrictions and reach US deal. Meanwhile IRGC vows 'capabilities the enemy has no idea about.' Military posturing vs economic reality — Iran's internal debate laid bare.
verificationNote: Israel Hayom, Fortune confirmed central bank warning. Xinhua confirmed IRGC statement.

text: Day 46 AM roundup: CENTCOM BLOCKADE IN EFFECT 14:00 GMT. Chinese tanker tests it. Trump: 'ELIMINATE.' IDF encircles Bint Jbeil (100+ Hezbollah killed). Bianco KIA. 8 IDF wounded by drone. Netanyahu Holocaust speech backs blockade. Vance 'economic terrorism.' Rubio Israel-Lebanon talks. Qassem rejects. Pope Leo 'no fear.' Guterres 'no military solution.' Iran 180% inflation. Brent $98.05. WTI $96.57. Gas $4.125.
verificationNote: Compiled from CENTCOM, NBC, Bloomberg, Times of Israel, i24NEWS, JPost, Al Jazeera, UN News, NPR, CNBC, AAA.

text: BLOCKADE DAY 1 RESULTS: 6 ships U-turned. Zero vessels reached Iranian ports. 3 vessels (incl. Chinese-owned Rich Starry + 2 sanctioned tankers) transited strait but NOT to Iran. 157.7M barrels Iranian oil floating on water — 97.6% destined for China. Beijing: 'The Strait is open to us.' Saudi + 5 Gulf states jointly demand US end blockade. Houthi al-Bukhaiti threatens own Bab al-Mandeb blockade.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, NBC News, Al Jazeera, CNBC confirmed blockade Day 1 results and China defiance.

text: HEZBOLLAH NEW CAPABILITY: First use of jam-proof optical-guidance drone. 40+ drones hit 20+ targets across northern Israel — Karmiel paratrooper base, Golani Division HQ at Shraga, Tefen base, Kiryat Shmona, Nahariya. Only small number intercepted. 'Heavy damage.' If Israeli EW can't defeat these, it neutralizes a key advantage. Mass deployment shows sustained production despite months of strikes.
verificationNote: PressTV, Middle East Monitor, Israel National News confirmed drone deployment and target list.

text: RUSSIA EVACUATES BUSHEHR: 108 of 128 staff pulled from Iran's nuclear plant. Rosatom: attack could cause 'Chernobyl-level disaster.' Only 20 remain. This signals Moscow believes a strike is plausible. Meanwhile Mossad Director Barnea: 'Our mission not complete until this radical regime is replaced.' First public regime-change call from Israeli intelligence chief. The endgame is expanding.
verificationNote: Kurdistan24, Moscow Times confirmed Bushehr. Times of Israel, APA confirmed Barnea statement.

text: OIL PLUNGING: Brent $94.87 (-4.4%), WTI $91.42 (-7.7%) — sharpest single-day drop since ceasefire. Pakistan pushing Islamabad Round 2 as early as Thursday. IEA BOMBSHELL: demand forecast slashed to -80K bpd (was +640K). March: 10.1M bpd lost = LARGEST supply disruption in HISTORY. IMF cuts global growth to 3.1%. Two major institutional reports in one day paint catastrophic economic picture.
verificationNote: CNBC, Trading Economics confirmed oil prices. Al Jazeera confirmed IEA. PBS, Bloomberg confirmed IMF.

text: ITALY BREAKS RANKS: PM Meloni suspends two-decade defense pact with Israel. FM Tajani: 'unacceptable attacks' on civilians. Israel summons ambassador. Third bilateral protest. Kallas: 'gravest violation of international law since WWII.' EU sanctions 19 Iranian officials. Lavrov arrives Beijing to coordinate with Wang Yi. Europe fragmenting — between opposing Israel AND sanctioning Iran simultaneously.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Haaretz confirmed Italy. EEAS confirmed Kallas. RFE/RL confirmed Lavrov-Beijing.

text: Day 46 PM roundup: Oil plunges Brent $94.87 WTI $91.42 on talk hopes. BLOCKADE DAY 1: 6 ships U-turned. Italy suspends defense pact. Hezbollah jam-proof drone hits 20+ targets. IDF 'Op Silver Plough' buffer zone. Russia evacuates Bushehr. Barnea: 'regime change.' Iran UN letter: 'gross violation.' IEA: 10.1M bpd lost. IMF: 3.1% growth. Kallas: 'gravest since WWII.' Lavrov-Beijing. Chelsea Manning arrested. Gas $4.118.
verificationNote: Compiled from CNBC, Trading Economics, Bloomberg, Al Jazeera, Haaretz, Middle East Monitor, Kurdistan24, Moscow Times, PressTV, PBS, Newsweek, AAA.
